description: Explore and visualize the San Francisco zoning dataset using Jupyter Lab to understand development regulations. Using the notebook at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/notebooks/zoning_exploration.ipynb, analyze the 'zoning' table from /home/ga/urbansim_projects/data/sanfran_public.h5. The analysis must include the first 10 rows, column data types, summary statistics for numeric zoning columns (max_far, max_height, and coverage), and the top 10 most common zoning districts by name. Save a histogram of the max_far distribution to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/zoning_far_histogram.png and export a summary CSV (containing column_name, mean, std, min, and max) to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/zoning_summary.csv. Ensure all notebook cells are executed with outputs visible.
